code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> AppInitialization
    
    AppInitialization --> PerformanceAssessment : Start Performance Monitor
    
    PerformanceAssessment --> DeviceCapabilityCheck
    DeviceCapabilityCheck --> InitialModeSelection
    
    InitialModeSelection --> UltraFastMode : Low-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> FastMode : Mid-range Device
    InitialModeSelection --> BalancedMode : High-end Device
    InitialModeSelection --> HighQualityMode : Premium Device
    
    state UltraFastMode {
        [*] --> QuarterResolution
        QuarterResolution --> BasicFaceDetection
        BasicFaceDetection --> MinimalProcessing
        MinimalProcessing --> LowBatteryUsage
        LowBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state FastMode {
        [*] --> HalfResolution
        HalfResolution --> FaceDetection
        FaceDetection --> BasicNSFWDetection
        BasicNSFWDetection --> ModerateBatteryUsage
        ModerateBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state BalancedMode {
        [*] --> FullResolution
        FullResolution --> CompleteFaceDetection
        CompleteFaceDetection --> FullNSFWDetection
        FullNSFWDetection --> GenderClassification
        GenderClassification --> OptimalBatteryUsage
        OptimalBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    state HighQualityMode {
        [*] --> EnhancedResolution
        EnhancedResolution --> AdvancedFaceDetection
        AdvancedFaceDetection --> EnhancedNSFWDetection
        EnhancedNSFWDetection --> DetailedGenderClassification
        DetailedGenderClassification --> ContentDensityAnalysis
        ContentDensityAnalysis --> HighBatteryUsage
        HighBatteryUsage --> PerformanceMonitoring
    }
    
    PerformanceMonitoring --> ContinuousMonitoring
    
    state ContinuousMonitoring {
        [*] --> CPUUsageCheck
        CPUUsageCheck --> MemoryUsageCheck
        MemoryUsageCheck --> BatteryLevelCheck
        BatteryLevelCheck --> ThermalStateCheck
        ThermalStateCheck --> NetworkLatencyCheck
        NetworkLatencyCheck --> PerformanceDecision
    }
    
    PerformanceDecision --> MaintainCurrentMode : Performance Good
    PerformanceDecision --> DegradePerformance : Performance Issues
    PerformanceDecision --> ImprovePerformance : Resources Available
    
    state DegradePerformance {
        [*] --> ReduceDetectionFrequency
        ReduceDetectionFrequency --> LowerResolution
        LowerResolution --> DisableNonEssentialFeatures
        DisableNonEssentialFeatures --> IncreaseCacheUsage
        IncreaseCacheUsage --> OptimizeMemoryUsage
    }
    
    state ImprovePerformance {
        [*] --> IncreaseDetectionQuality
        IncreaseDetectionQuality --> HigherResolution
        HigherResolution --> EnableAdditionalFeatures
        EnableAdditionalFeatures --> ReduceCacheDependency
        ReduceCacheDependency --> EnhancePrecision
    }
    
    DegradePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    ImprovePerformance --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    MaintainCurrentMode --> AdaptiveAdjustment
    
    state AdaptiveAdjustment {
        [*] --> ApplyChanges
        ApplyChanges --> TestNewSettings
        TestNewSettings --> ValidatePerformance
        ValidatePerformance --> UpdateConfiguration
    }
    
    AdaptiveAdjustment --> ContinuousMonitoring : Return to Monitoring
    
    %% Emergency scenarios
    ContinuousMonitoring --> EmergencyMode : Critical Performance Issue
    
    state EmergencyMode {
        [*] --> MinimalDetection
        MinimalDetection --> CriticalFeaturesOnly
        CriticalFeaturesOnly --> MaximumCaching
        MaximumCaching --> EmergencyOptimization
        EmergencyOptimization --> GradualRecovery
    }
    
    EmergencyMode --> ContinuousMonitoring : Performance Recovered
    
    %% User-triggered changes
    ContinuousMonitoring --> UserModeChange : User Changes Settings
    
    state UserModeChange {
        [*] --> ValidateUserChoice
        ValidateUserChoice --> ApplyUserSettings
        ApplyUserSettings --> WarnIfIncompatible
        WarnIfIncompatible --> AcceptOverride
    }
    
    UserModeChange --> ContinuousMonitoring : Settings Applied
    
    %% Battery-specific optimizations
    ContinuousMonitoring --> BatteryOptimization : Low Battery Detected
    
    state BatteryOptimization {
        [*] --> ReduceProcessingFrequency
        ReduceProcessingFrequency --> DisableBackgroundFeatures
        DisableBackgroundFeatures --> MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks
        MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks --> EnableDeepCaching
        EnableDeepCaching --> BatterySaveMode
    }
    
    BatteryOptimization --> ContinuousMonitoring : Battery Level Improved
    
    %% Thermal management
    ContinuousMonitoring --> ThermalThrottling : Overheating Detected
    
    state ThermalThrottling {
        [*] --> ReduceProcessorUsage
        ReduceProcessorUsage --> IncreaseProcessingIntervals
        IncreaseProcessingIntervals --> DisableGPUAcceleration
        DisableGPUAcceleration --> CooldownPause
        CooldownPause --> ThermalRecovery
    }
    
    ThermalThrottling --> ContinuousMonitoring : Temperature Normal
    
    note right of UltraFastMode
        Basic protection with minimal resource usage
        - Face detection only
        - 224x224 resolution
        - 500ms intervals
        - ~2% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of BalancedMode
        Recommended mode for most users
        - Full feature set
        - Native resolution
        - 2000ms intervals
        - ~5-8% battery/hour
    end note
    
    note right of HighQualityMode
        Maximum accuracy and features
        - Enhanced processing
        - Content density analysis
        - 3000ms intervals
        - ~12-15% battery/hour
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个自适应的实时检测系统状态机，核心要能根据设备性能动态调整工作模式。先从初始化流程开始吧，App启动后要先做性能评估。
明白了，所以起始点是AppInitialization，然后流转到PerformanceAssessment，触发条件是"Start Performance Monitor"？之后需要检查设备能力来分档吗？
对，DeviceCapabilityCheck之后进入InitialModeSelection，这里要分四档：低端机走UltraFastMode，中端走FastMode，高端走BalancedMode，旗舰机走HighQualityMode。
好的，我先把四个模式作为并行状态画出来。UltraFastMode内部从QuarterResolution开始，经过BasicFaceDetection和MinimalProcessing，最后到LowBatteryUsage和PerformanceMonitoring。
FastMode的结构类似，但分辨率提升到HalfResolution，检测能力要加强到FaceDetection和BasicNSFWDetection，电池消耗标记为ModerateBatteryUsage。
已添加FastMode的内部状态。现在画BalancedMode——这是推荐模式，用FullResolution，包含CompleteFaceDetection、FullNSFWDetection，还要加上GenderClassification和OptimalBatteryUsage。
HighQualityMode是旗舰专用，用EnhancedResolution，检测升级到AdvancedFaceDetection和EnhancedNSFWDetection，性别分类也要细化成DetailedGenderClassification，还要做ContentDensityAnalysis。
HighQualityMode已完善，内部状态到HighBatteryUsage结束。四个模式都连到PerformanceMonitoring，然后进入ContinuousMonitoring状态，这个作为复合状态来设计。
ContinuousMonitoring要监控五个维度：CPUUsageCheck、MemoryUsageCheck、BatteryLevelCheck、ThermalStateCheck、NetworkLatencyCheck，最后汇总到PerformanceDecision。
监控链路画好了。PerformanceDecision之后分三支：性能良好时MaintainCurrentMode，有问题时DegradePerformance，资源充裕时ImprovePerformance，对吗？
没错，三支最终都要汇聚到AdaptiveAdjustment。DegradePerformance内部要降频、降分辨率、关非核心功能、增缓存、优化内存。
DegradePerformance复合状态已完成。ImprovePerformance则是反向操作：提升检测质量、提高分辨率、启用附加功能、减少缓存依赖、增强精度。
AdaptiveAdjustment作为调整中枢，内部要有ApplyChanges、TestNewSettings、ValidatePerformance、UpdateConfiguration，验证完成后返回ContinuousMonitoring形成闭环。
主循环已建立。现在需要处理异常分支吗？比如极端情况下的紧急模式。
对，ContinuousMonitoring发现Critical Performance Issue时要进入EmergencyMode，只做MinimalDetection和CriticalFeaturesOnly，强制MaximumCaching和EmergencyOptimization，最后GradualRecovery。
EmergencyMode画好了，恢复后回到ContinuousMonitoring。还需要用户主动干预的分支吗？
需要UserModeChange分支，用户改设置时触发，先ValidateUserChoice，然后ApplyUserSettings，如果不兼容要WarnIfIncompatible，但用户可以选择AcceptOverride强制生效。
UserModeChange已添加，设置应用后返回监控循环。电池优化和温度管理也要独立分支吧？
Low Battery Detected时进入BatteryOptimization，逐步ReduceProcessingFrequency、DisableBackgroundFeatures、MinimizeCPUIntensiveTasks、EnableDeepCaching，最终进入BatterySaveMode。
BatteryOptimization完成，电池改善后返回ContinuousMonitoring。温度管理用ThermalThrottling命名可以吗？
可以，Overheating Detected触发，内部依次ReduceProcessorUsage、IncreaseProcessingIntervals、DisableGPUAcceleration，然后CooldownPause等待ThermalRecovery。
所有异常分支都画完了，温度正常后返回监控。现在给关键模式加注释说明吧？
UltraFastMode注释写：基础防护，224x224分辨率，500ms间隔，每小时约2%耗电。BalancedMode是推荐模式，原生分辨率，2000ms间隔，5-8%耗电。
注释已添加。HighQualityMode也补上了：增强处理、内容密度分析、3000ms间隔、12-15%耗电。整体结构检查一遍，各模式到PerformanceMonitoring的连线都正确。
等等，检查下EmergencyMode的返回路径，确认是Performance Recovered条件回到ContinuousMonitoring，不是直接结束。
确认无误，EmergencyMode到ContinuousMonitoring的转移条件就是Performance Recovered。所有复合状态的入口[*]也都正确标注了。
最后确认AdaptiveAdjustment的返回路径，标注为"Return to Monitoring"，和UserModeChange的"Settings Applied"区分开。
转移条件已更新。BatteryOptimization和ThermalThrottling的返回条件分别是"Battery Level Improved"和"Temperature Normal"，也都标注清楚了。
很好，这个状态机覆盖了从初始化、分级运行、持续监控到自适应调整的全生命周期，异常处理也完整。可以定稿了。
状态机已完成，包含4个主要运行模式、5个监控维度、3个性能调整分支、4个异常处理分支，所有状态转移和复合状态结构都已验证。
